summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Darwaza Platform Phase 2 & 3 features. Backend APIs 100% passing (19/19 tests). Frontend CookingPage and ArabWorldPage fully functional with video players, category filtering, and country detail panels working correctly.

issues: YouTube video IDs are placeholders (dQw4w9WgXcQ = Rick Astley) - expected per requirements, to be replaced by user

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring to modular routers is clean and well-organized
JSON data files (food_data.json, arab_data.json) are properly structured with bilingual content
Frontend pages correctly fetch data from APIs and handle loading states
seed_data_creation: None - API returns sample data from JSON files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 (Backend Refactoring) and Phase 2 (Smart Data Architecture) are complete. All content APIs serve JSON data correctly. Phase 3 UI features tested - CookingPage has 8 video tutorials with category filtering, ArabWorldPage has 6 country cards with detail panels showing videos and dishes. Theme selection (Heritage/Modern) and language switching work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/content/food-videos returns 8 videos with 5 categories
Backend API /api/content/arab-countries returns 6 countries with video and dish data
Backend API /api/subscriptions/plans returns 4 subscription plans with correct pricing
Backend API /api/marketplace/items returns 8 sample antique items
CookingPage loads video tutorials grid correctly
CookingPage category filtering works (All, Kuwaiti, Gulf, Levantine, Maghrebi, Desserts)
CookingPage YouTube video player opens on click and closes correctly
ArabWorldPage loads 6 country cards with flags and dishes
ArabWorldPage country detail panel shows video and dish when clicked
ArabWorldPage YouTube video player opens for country videos
Theme selection (Heritage/Modern) works and persists in localStorage

features_verified.backend_refactoring: Complete - server.py split into modular routers
features_verified.data_architecture: Complete - JSON files serve food videos and arab countries data
features_verified.ui_ux: Complete - Neo-Heritage design with theme switching
